Why Sweetgrass

EROSION CONTROL DONE RIGHT.

Sweetgrass Hydroseed + Erosion Control is a Houston-based company specializing in hydroseeding, hydromulching, and erosion control for homeowners, developers, and contractors. Whether you have a bare backyard, a new construction site, or an exposed slope threatening your property — we stabilize it fast at a fraction of the cost of sod.

01

Erosion Stopped Fast

Exposed soil does not wait. Our hydromulch applications bind to the ground immediately, protecting your site from runoff and soil loss while seed establishes beneath.

02

Residential & Commercial

From a single backyard to a multi-acre commercial build, we specialize in both. We understand what homeowners and contractors need — and we deliver for both.

03

Cost-Effective Results

Hydroseeding costs a fraction of traditional sod while delivering the same lush, full coverage. No compromise on quality — just smarter spending for your project.

What We Do

PROFESSIONAL EROSION & GROUND SERVICES

Erosion Control

Our primary specialty. We protect exposed slopes, berms, drainage channels, and disturbed construction sites from soil loss and runoff using proven hydromulch and erosion control seed blends. If water or wind is moving your soil, we stop it.

Slope StabilizationErosion Control Blends Channel CoverageSite Runoff ProtectionLand Disturbance Sites

Up to 3 acres per project

Hydroseeding

A fast, cost-effective method of establishing grass by spraying a slurry of seed, mulch, fertilizer, and water onto prepared soil. Even coverage, healthy growth, and results in days. Perfect for lawns, acreage, and post-construction sites.

Bermuda GrassCentipede GrassNative Grass Mixes Wildflower MixesPollinator-FriendlyNative Texas Wildflowers

Residential Builds

New home construction, pool installations, landscaping renovations — we get your yard established quickly and affordably. Realtors and homebuilders count on us to finish the job right for new builds across Houston.

New Construction LawnsPool Surrounds Lawn RenovationBackyard CoverageBuilder Partnerships

Commercial Builds

We work with developers, general contractors, and land developers on commercial construction projects requiring erosion control and vegetation establishment. Our FINN T120 handles large footprints efficiently.

Commercial DevelopmentLand Clearing Sites Large AcreageRight-of-WaySite Stabilization

Specializing in residential & commercial builds

Our Equipment

BUILT FOR THE JOB.

We run the FINN T120 Hydro-Seeder — a commercial-grade machine capable of covering large residential and commercial sites efficiently. It delivers consistent, uniform application whether we are seeding a backyard or stabilizing a 3-acre construction site.

Our truck and trailer setup gets us to job sites across the Houston metro fast, with everything needed to complete your project in a single visit.

FINN T120 — Commercial capacity. Residential precision.

Our Work

REAL PROJECTS. REAL RESULTS.

SERVING GREATER HOUSTON.
